subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured by the signs of God! The honorable Shaykh Salman hath arrived at the Most Great Prison and attained the blessing of visiting the sacred and hallowed shrine [3.5s]... ...In this day, no greater manifestation of love and kindness can be conceived in the world of existence than this
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله جناب شیخ سلمان در سجن اعظم وارد و بزیارت رمس مطهر فائز از
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @firmness in the Covenant
